query:
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count, 
  ROUND(MIN(price)/100.0, 2) as min_price_dollars, 
  ROUND(MAX(price)/100.0, 2) as max_price_dollars,
  ROUND(AVG(price)/100.0, 2) as avg_price_dollars
FROM products 
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY category;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute 
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count, 
  ROUND(MIN(price)/100.0, 2) as min_price_dollars, 
  ROUND(MAX(price)/100.0, 2) as max_price_dollars,
  ROUND(AVG(price)/100.0, 2) as avg_price_dollars
FROM products 
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY category;
